title: Indiana Senate Passes Legislation to Incentivize Higher Ethanol Blends at Gas Stations
content: The Indiana Senate passed a bill SB 254 on Monday that would provide tax credits to gas stations that sell higher blends of biofuels like ethanol â€” as well as credits for companies that make and blend the fuel. Indiana is one of the top states for ethanol production and more than 40 percent of the stateâ€™s corn crop is used for it.
author: Analysts Account
